findings.summary: Codex agents hit turn limits — 3/4 produced partial output. File-first instruction included but agents still exhausted turns before cross-reference sections.
findings.evidence: audit-trait-runner.md: 4/6 sections 'Pending review'. audit-expansion-batch.md: 3/4 scripts. audit-pathway-config.md: 0 pipeline_config findings.
findings.proposed_fix: Max 3 files per Codex agent (was 4-5). Split cross-reference into separate agent.

findings.summary: TaskCreate hook blocks all calls in genomics project. 4 calls wasted.
findings.evidence: PreToolUse:TaskCreate hook error on all 4 attempts
findings.proposed_fix: Stop using TaskCreate in genomics. Known constraint.
